compiled_state.title: Add review.huge_diff_file_threshold entries to CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md and dso-config.example.conf
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Type
GREEN (makes all 4 Task 1 tests pass)

## Description
Add `### \`review.huge_diff_file_threshold\`` section to CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md after the `review.behavioral_patterns` section (after line ~750, before `debug.*` entries). Add commented entry to `plugins/dso/docs/dso-config.example.conf` in the review configuration block after the `review.behavioral_patterns` entry.

Both files bundled because they document the same config key and neither change is independently meaningful to an operator.

## CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md entry (insert after review.behavioral_patterns closing ---)

```markdown
### \`review.huge_diff_file_threshold\`

| | |
|---|---|
| **Description** | Minimum number of changed files in a diff that activates the large-refactor review path. When a diff meets or exceeds this threshold, review routing switches to the extended large-diff workflow instead of the standard deep-tier path. |
| **Accepted values** | Positive integer. Values of \`0\` or negative are a validation error and will halt review dispatch with an error message. |
| **Default** | \`20\` |

---
```

## dso-config.example.conf entry (after review.behavioral_patterns entry in review configuration block)

```bash
# Minimum files changed to activate the large-refactor review path.
# Positive integers only; 0 or negative values are a validation error.
# review.huge_diff_file_threshold=20
```

## TDD Requirement
Before this task: `bash tests/scripts/test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh` shows FAIL:4, PASS:0. After implementation, all 4 show PASS.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Verify: `bash tests/scripts/test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh 2>&1 | grep "^PASS:.*test_config_ref_has_huge_threshold_section"`
- Verify: `bash tests/scripts/test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh 2>&1 | grep "^PASS:.*test_config_ref_huge_threshold_default_20"`
- Verify: `bash tests/scripts/test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh 2>&1 | grep "^PASS:.*test_config_ref_huge_threshold_positive_integers"`
- Verify: `bash tests/scripts/test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh 2>&1 | grep "^PASS:.*test_example_conf_has_huge_threshold_entry"`
- Verify: `grep -q 'review\.huge_diff_file_threshold' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md`
- Verify: `grep -A10 'huge_diff_file_threshold' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md | grep -q '20'`
- Verify: `grep -A10 'huge_diff_file_threshold' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md | grep -qi 'positive integer'`
- Verify: `grep -A10 'huge_diff_file_threshold' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md | grep -qiE '0.*negative|negative.*0|validation error'`
- Verify: `grep -q 'huge_diff_file_threshold=20' plugins/dso/docs/dso-config.example.conf`
- Verify: `grep -B2 'huge_diff_file_threshold=20' plugins/dso/docs/dso-config.example.conf | grep -q '#'`
